name: 通用视频项目
description: 最小可用模板，顶层 HtmlComponent 模式

content.html:
示例标题

副标题 / 概述句
content.css: .hero { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .title { font-size: 48px; font-weight: 900; color: #111827; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 12px; } .subtitle { font-size: 20px; color: #374151; line-height: 1.6; }

content.html:
核心要点

用一段话点明价值

查看详情
content.css: .section { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .title { font-size: 48px; font-weight: 900; color: #111827; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 12px; } .desc { font-size: 20px; color: #374151; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 16px; } .badge { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; background: #10B981; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; }

content.html:
号召行动

邀请用户下一步行动

扫码体验
content.css: .cta { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .title { font-size: 48px; font-weight: 900; color: #111827; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 12px; } .desc { font-size: 20px; color: #374151; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 16px; } .badge { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; background: #F59E0B; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; }
